explanation: The structured natural language property states that whenever the system is supported (bool_exp1) and sensor data is good (bool_exp2), the autopilot shall change states from PULLUP (state_is_PULLUP) to TRANSITION (state_is_TRANSITION).  This captures the intent of the input by specifying that the state change should occur immediately upon the satisfaction of the specified conditions.
decision1_substring: The autopilot shall change states from PULLUP to TRANSITION when the system is supported and sensor data is good.
decision3_substring: The autopilot shall change states from PULLUP to TRANSITION when the system is supported and sensor data is good.
output_structured_natural_language: whenever supported & good, immediately satisfy state_is_TRANSITION
